steps.title: Use the list of accomplishments
steps.content: The colon introduces evidence for the description of Moreno's contributions. The list includes professorship, poetry, a grammar book, and co-founding an institute, showing breadth across several areas of linguistics and language work.

steps.title: Reject mismatched descriptors
steps.content:
• Choice A means practical, but the sentence emphasizes scope, not practicality.
  • Choice B means disputed, and nothing suggests controversy.
  • Choice D means applying everywhere, which is too broad for accomplishments tied to specific roles and institutions.
The answer is C.
